heading: Funding requirements
label: 5011 Funding requirements

children.text: necessary travel expenses of the United States Commissioners or Alternate Commissioners; and
the United States’ share of the joint expenses of the Commission.

children.heading: Research
children.label: b Research
children.text: Such funds as shall be made available to the Secretary of Commerce for research and related activities shall be expended to carry out the program of the Commission in accordance with the recommendations of the United States Section and to carry out other research and observer programs pursuant to the Convention.
